option.value:
import os import re
# Material file paths and their corresponding texture GUIDs materials_update = { r'C:\Users
acho\sandbox\videojuegos\ve erre\Assets\MarpaStudio\Built-In\Materials\CeilingLamp.mat': 'c4c94c36b2cd7c148aeda222370879dc', r'C:\Users
acho\sandbox\videojuegos\ve erre\Assets\MarpaStudio\Built-In\Materials\PlaneSeat.mat': '37735c62e503b8e42b34ffdde734f2dd', r'C:\Users
acho\sandbox\videojuegos\ve erre\Assets\MarpaStudio\Built-In\Materials\Ring.mat': 'd3fd70b31abf1144d80569968756c2aa', r'C:\Users
acho\sandbox\videojuegos\ve erre\Assets\MarpaStudio\Built-In\Materials\SecondFloorBarricade.mat': 'aaf4c7c8c45ee6345be5489866549ba0', r'C:\Users
acho\sandbox\videojuegos\ve erre\Assets\MarpaStudio\Built-In\Materials\SecondFloorBigEntrance.mat': '733502e8068bc89479fd3328af273df8', r'C:\Users
acho\sandbox\videojuegos\ve erre\Assets\MarpaStudio\Built-In\Materials\SecondFloorCeiling.mat': '681c16af7bfd110408a6c3f0d926635a', r'C:\Users
acho\sandbox\videojuegos\ve erre\Assets\MarpaStudio\Built-In\Materials\SecondFloorSeatsBase.mat': '9c356b66c1c0f284aaa638566af85067', r'C:\Users
acho\sandbox\videojuegos\ve erre\Assets\MarpaStudio\Built-In\Materials\SmalLWallBarricade.mat': 'c6b4bc9b6e58741488ec569b1a039b06', r'C:\Users
acho\sandbox\videojuegos\ve erre\Assets\MarpaStudio\Built-In\Materials\TopFloorSeatBase.mat': '594f68ae4a9e070478890f42f294e3f1', r'C:\Users
acho\sandbox\videojuegos\ve erre\Assets\MarpaStudio\Built-In\Materials\Walls.mat': 'c72c838d1b8d32846acb11d84baf9320', }
for mat_path, texture_guid in materials_update.items(): if not os.path.exists(mat_path): print(f"[ERROR] File not found: {mat_path}") continue
with open(mat_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f: content = f.read()
original_content = content
# Replace _BaseMap and _MainTex with the correct texture GUID # Pattern for _BaseMap with fileID: 0 content = re.sub( r'(- _BaseMap:\s*
\s*m_Texture: \{fileID: )0(\}[^
]*guid:)', rf'\g<1>2800000, guid: {texture_guid}\2', content )
# Pattern for _MainTex with fileID: 0 content = re.sub( r'(- _MainTex:\s*
\s*m_Texture: \{fileID: )0(\}[^
]*guid:)', rf'\g<1>2800000, guid: {texture_guid}\2', content )
if content != original_content: with open(mat_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(content) print(f"[UPDATED] {os.path.basename(mat_path)}") else: print(f"[SKIPPED] {os.path.basename(mat_path)} - No changes needed")
print("
Done!")
